news.title: Nvidia embraces role of AI investor, pushing past $40 billion in equity bets this year
news.summary: N Nvidia is pouring billions of dollars at a time into companies across the AI infrastructure stack. The company is also signing commercial deals with them.

news.title: Why one of the nation's largest auto lenders isn't worried about high vehicle prices or 'forever loans'
news.summary: median car payments have jumped from $390 to $525 since 2019. Data provided by Capital One suggests stability in vehicle cost compared to income.

news.title: Major crypto bill slated for May 14 Senate Banking Committee vote
news.summary: Crypto industry's top legislative priority, a bill determining oversight of digital assets, is set to advance in the Senate Banking Committee. The bill is expected to be voted on in the next few days.

news.title: The Iran war will change global energy markets in these important ways, oil executives say
news.summary: Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has resulted in the loss of nearly a billion barrels of oil. The shortage is growing worse every day.

news.title: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths
news.summary: U.S. businesses like rare earths and supply chains may take a back seat on the agenda for the Trump-Xi summit. Thanks to the Iran war, big issues for U.S.-China relations may be on the back burner.

news.title: My niece is on Social Security Disability Insurance. Will she lose her health insurance if I buy her a house?
news.summary: “She has not been able to get approved for a mortgage, so I want to help her,” he says. “She’s not been allowed to get a mortgage for years.”

news.title: Introducing the ‘NACHO’ trade: How Wall Street is betting on higher oil prices and persistent inflation
news.summary: Wall Street is glomming on to yet another acronym inspired in part by Mexican cuisine. The acronym is called Wall Street Financial Services, or WSFS. WSFS is an acronym for Wall Street Finance Services.

news.title: The unsinkable U.S. economy cruises on, despite headwinds from the Iran war
news.summary: The economy keeps expanding in the face of macro obstacles. The U.S. economy is growing at a faster rate than the rest of the world's.

news.title: The most prestigious job in AI has no description
news.summary: Everyone from Anthropic to tiny startups is hiring for the “member of technical staff” — but does anyone know what it means?

news.title: More Americans are buying homes to fit multiple generations: ‘It answered a lot of prayers’
news.summary: Multigenerational living is expected to get even more popular as baby boomers age. The average age of a family of four in the U.S. is now 54.
